projects.name: Real Estate Trading/Rental Web System
projects.description: Developed a web system for real estate trading and rental, featuring 5 core services: Listing, Sales, Rental, Payment, and Security. Implemented using Java Spring Boot with MySQL/PostgreSQL and MongoDB for databases. Built CRUD APIs and developed the user interface with Thymeleaf, resulting in a functional basic real estate website.

projects.name: Phone Sales POS Web System
projects.description: Created a web-based Point of Sale (POS) system for a phone store, designed for staff and administrators. The system supports sales transaction processing, product management, employee management, customer management, and generates reports and statistics. Key functionalities include account, product, customer management, and sales transaction handling, successfully meeting all sales management requirements.
